creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
An arm64 build shouldn't be including immintrin.h. Later version of clang include guards to prevent this:

#if !defined(__i386__) && !defined(__x86_64__)
#error "This header is only meant to be used on x86 and x64 architecture"
#endif

I could merge the guards, but I believe it wouldn't change anything other than the error messages unless it's being included due to an autoconf script that is ignoring warnings.
